channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #45: Fireworks and a Car Battery!
item.description:
A police officer caught two kids playing with a firework and a car battery.
He charged one and let the other one off.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260506-2304.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #44: That Took Awhile!
item.description:
I ate a clock yesterday.
It was so time consuming.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260506-1606.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #43: What a stylish number!
item.description:
What did the 0 say to the 8?
Nice belt.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260505-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #41: Time to Accessorize?
item.description:
I made a belt out of watches once...
It was a waist of time.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260504-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #39: What do trees get up to on sunny days?
item.description:
Why do trees seem suspicious on sunny days?
Dunno, they're just a bit shady.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260503-2300.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #38: Factory on FIRE?!
item.description:
Did you hear about the bread factory burning down?
They say the business is toast.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260503-1456.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #37: Protons Have Mass?
item.description:
Did you know that protons have mass?
I didn't even know they were catholic.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260502-2300.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #36: Feeling the Heat?
item.description:
Why is it always hot in the corner of a room?
Because a corner is 90 degrees.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260502-1456.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #35: Trees Behaving Badly?!
item.description:
Why do trees seem suspicious on sunny days?
Dunno, they're just a bit shady.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260501-2304.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #34: Sports Fan Animal?
item.description:
What animal is always at a game of cricket?
A bat.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260501-1738.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #30: A Groundbreaking Invention?
item.description:
What was a more important invention than the first telephone?
The second one.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260429-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #29: Hippos in trees?!
item.description:
Why don't you find hippopotamuses hiding in trees?
They're really good at it.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260429-1606.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #28: Where’s the bin
item.description:
Where’s the bin?
Dad: I haven’t been anywhere!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260428-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #27: A quick shoutout to...
item.description:
A quick shoutout to all of the sidewalks out there...
Thanks for keeping me off the streets.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260428-1610.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #26: Do you know where...
item.description:
Do you know where you can get chicken broth in bulk?
The stock market.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260427-2307.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #25: My Computer Froze!
item.description:
It was so cold yesterday my computer froze.
My own fault though, I left too many windows open.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260427-1553.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #24: 80's Band Problems!
item.description:
I was in an 80's band called the prevention.
We were better than the cure.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260426-2256.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #23: Break a Leg? But Why?!
item.description:
Why do we tell actors to “break a leg?
” Because every play has a cast.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260426-1454.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #22: Magical Cows?!
item.description:
What kind of magic do cows believe in?
MOODOO.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260425-2254.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #21: Ghostly Garments?
item.description:
What kind of pants do ghosts wear?
Boo jeans.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260425-1452.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
